item.title: Images of Note: underwater wife
item.description:
The fact these three (presumed) strangers all said "look up in the sky" just seems odd.
it's just horses in here
More Batman TV shows should pay attention to the fact Alfred is ex SAS.
I know the ides were yesterday but HAPPY STABBING CAESAR DAY
What is she watching?
This is not a Cerveza Cristal meme
Priest Kermit, archangelooooooooooooo
CHEESE HIM!
I kinda wich Hailey was a surfer because it would make her so much more interesting.
oh my God
(Yes, JK realy went down the Holocaust denial route with transgender people).
Himbo Elliot. Himbo Elliot
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also i'm streaming: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: A casino.
item.description: How the fuck do you bankrupt a casino?! They literally have a license to print money, but he did it SEVERAL TIMES. https://finance.yahoo.com/news/donald-trump-owned-several-atlantic-181258334.html
item.dc:creator: jansenart

item.title: Didn't know they give the Pokemon new names
item.dc:creator: Life1Of2Music

item.title: How OP got his first girlfriend at 16 despite being clueless
item.description:
I was 16 and she was 14. We were in the same grade because I never took school seriously and got held back.
I thought she was way out of my league. Didn't even consider she was interested in a dork like me
She tried for like two weeks to seduce me
was thinking on the wat back to my parents house if she was hinting that she wanted me to buy her some clothes. That seemed at the time to be the most likely scenario
And so happy too! I couldn't say yes fast enough
We've talked about a more formal arrangement, but she's divorced and doesn't want to be tied down. Well, she has let me tie her down, but the Cuffs got to come off eventually I have told her I would put a ring on it
item.dc:creator: blankman757

item.title: My first cakeday! Have a bunch of random stuff (and cat tax)
item.description:
Well, he *did* say it in Korean, so not technically a lie.
At 18 years old, my hip joint dislocated because I turned around to look at a cute boy.
Once more, with feeling (Buffy the Vampire Slayer)
Moomin mom has her priorities straight.
I'm neutral good, my partner is chaotic neutral.
A weekly occurrence in our home.
BtVS and Lucifer are my favourite shows. They're the background noise on my TV when I do other things because I don't need to look at the screen to see what happens. If anyone have recommendations for other shows in the same style as those two, share in the comments, I need new shows to watch bc my partner is getting fed up listening to the same thing over and over. Please help me get a new hyperfixation.
To late for Ceasar day...
Me too, Moomin dad. Me too....
Ending with two classics.
Cattax Charlie was only 9 months old, she didn't even have her learner's permit.
I meme'd my cat. She doesn't like cream, milk, ice cream, chicken or beef. She does like gingerbread cookies, sugarfree oatmeal cookies, and yoghurt with homemade müsli. And tuna, of course.
"And AAAAAA-AA-AAII will always live Yoouuuu" Thanks to every Imgurian who make this place awesome.
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Meanwhile in Turkey
item.description: In Turkey, a container ship accidentally toppled three giant cranes The incident took place at the Turkish international port of Kocaeli. Fortunately, there were no reported casualties.
item.dc:creator: DarthPutinKGB

item.title: Rear-ending you with bottom shelf memes.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Did not intend to confuse people so badly here. For context: Hello! My name is Heather. I'm a server a restaurant. I had 2 people sit at a table of mine. The lady introduced me to her husband and, in return said "Heather, this is my husband" To which I said "You don't look like my husband" (because I also have a husband...who looked nothing like the man she said was 'my husband') ...just a shitty dad joke. Wasn't expecting to rile anyone up over it
Let's take a dive into the algorithm. What does the internet suggest this bottom shelf meme distributor should purchase today?
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Deaf cat Magoo ( short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
There's just @nosimpleway to please everyone.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka
